post.description:
Issue an operational X.509 certificate for the device. The certificate is
signed using the certificate authority policy bound to this authentication
profile. Applies to Microsoft-managed X.509 authentication profiles. The
issued certificate chain is delivered by the GET on the corresponding
`issueCertResults` status monitor endpoint.

post.description:
Revoke certificates issued for the device authentication profile. Applies to
Microsoft-managed X.509 certificates: invalidates outstanding certificates
via the PKI revocation list. The authentication profile itself is preserved.
Status is polled via the dedicated GET on the corresponding
`revokeCertsResults` status monitor endpoint.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Azure.Core.Foundations.InnerError.description: An object containing more specific information about the error. As per Azure REST API guidelines - https://aka.ms/AzureRestApiGuidelines#handling-errors.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

csr.description:
Base64-encoded DER certificate signing request (CSR) without PEM
headers and footers. Format of the CSR is in PKCS 10. The CN field of
the CSR must be set to the device's external device id (registrationId).

issuedCertificateChain.description: The full chain of the issued certificate.

Status monitor for the long-running `:generateReport` action on a namespace.

result.description: The result of the operation. Available once `status` is `Succeeded`.

endTime.description: The time at which the operation reached a terminal state (UTC).

symmetricKey.description: Plaintext symmetric keys for the device authentication profile.

values.name: Device
values.description: A group of devices.

totalUpdateableDeviceCount.description: Total number of devices in the group that are eligible for updates.

onBestUpdateDeviceCount.description: Number of updateable devices that are currently on the best available update.

bestUpdateAvailableDeviceCount.description: Number of updateable devices for which a better update is available but not yet applied.

devicesInProgressOnBestUpdate.description: Number of updateable devices currently being updated to the best available update.

totalNotUpdateableDeviceCount.description: Total number of devices in the group that are not eligible for updates.

InstallResult.description: The terminal result of an update attempt as reported by the device update agent.

outcome.description: Authoritative terminal outcome of the update attempt.

failureOrigin.description: Best-effort hint identifying which subsystem produced the failure. Value is `NOT_APPLICABLE` for successful install.

resultCode.description: Result code representing an install result. 0 or negative failures designate failures, positive values indicate success.

extendedResultCodes.description: Comma-separated list of agent ExtendedResultCode (ERC) values for diagnostic correlation. Each value is the unsigned hexadecimal representation of an `int32`.

stepResults.description: Per-step results of the steps defined by the manifest's `instructions.steps`.

InstallResultCreateOrUpdate.description: The terminal result of an update attempt as reported by the device update agent.

outcome.description: Authoritative terminal outcome of the update attempt.

failureOrigin.description: Best-effort hint identifying which subsystem produced the failure. Value is `NOT_APPLICABLE` for successful install.

resultCode.description: Result code representing an install result. 0 or negative failures designate failures, positive values indicate success.

extendedResultCodes.description: Comma-separated list of agent ExtendedResultCode (ERC) values for diagnostic correlation. Each value is the unsigned hexadecimal representation of an `int32`.

stepResults.description: Per-step results of the steps defined by the manifest's `instructions.steps`.

InstallResultFailureOrigin.description: Best-effort hint identifying which subsystem produced an install failure.

values.name: AduCloudService
values.description: Failure communicating with the ADU cloud service.

values.name: AduManagedResource
values.description: Failure related to ADU managed resources. (e.g. CDN download failure)

values.name: AgentCore
values.description: Failure in the ADU agent core components (workflow, state machine, manifest parsing, common utilities).

values.name: AgentExtension
values.description: Failure in a customer-supplied content handler or extension code (content handler, communication provider, log provider, component enumerator). The ADU agent core functioned correctly.

values.name: AgentDependency
values.description: Failure in an agent dependency (e.g. local identity service).

values.name: Device
values.description: Device-side problem — storage, battery, hardware fault, transient device condition (busy, maintenance mode), permissions.

values.name: Other
values.description: Failure origin does not fit into any of the predefined categories. This is also used as the default failure origin.

values.name: NotApplicable
values.description: This failure origin must be used for non-failed result outcomes.

InstallResultOutcome.description: Authoritative terminal outcome of an update attempt or step, as reported by the device update agent.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: The step or workflow completed successfully.

values.name: Failed
values.description: The step or workflow failed.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: The step or workflow was canceled before reaching a terminal state.

values.name: Skipped
values.description: The step was skipped because it was not required.

InstallableUpdatesForTargetDevices.description: The set of installable updates available for a class of target devices in the group.

targetDevices.description: The devices that this set of updates targets.

installableUpdates.description: The updates that can be installed on the targeted devices.

IotHubDeviceCapabilityProperties.description: The device capability properties for an IoTHub capability

IotHubDeviceCapabilityPropertiesCreateOr.description: The device capability properties for an IoTHub capability

IotHubEndpoint.description: IoT Hub endpoint target for device provisioning.

name.description: Display name of the target endpoint.

address.description: IoT Hub service endpoint address (e.g. myhub.azure-devices.net).

IotHubEndpointCreateOrUpdate.description: IoT Hub endpoint target for device provisioning.

name.description: Display name of the target endpoint.

address.description: IoT Hub service endpoint address (e.g. myhub.azure-devices.net).

IssueCertResult.description: Status monitor for the long-running `:issueCert` action on a device authentication profile.

id.description: The unique ID of the operation.

error.description: Error object that describes the error when status is "Failed".

result.description: The result of the operation. Available once `status` is `Succeeded`.

startTime.description: The time at which the operation was started (UTC).

endTime.description: The time at which the operation reached a terminal state (UTC).

IssuedCertificateChain.description:
The full chain of the issued certificate, including any intermediate
certification authorities (ICAs) and the root certification authority
(CA). The first certificate in the list is the issued leaf certificate.
Each subsequent certificate is the issuer of the previous.

LongRunningOperationIdResponseHeader.description:
Response `Operation-Id` header used by long-running action operations
(POST `:verb` endpoints).

namespaceUuid.description: The unique identifier of the namespace.

totalUpdateableDeviceCount.description: Total number of devices in the namespace that are eligible for updates.

onLatestUpdateDeviceCount.description: Number of updateable devices that are currently on the latest available update.

newUpdatesAvailableDeviceCount.description: Number of updateable devices for which a newer update is available but not yet applied.

updatesInProgressDeviceCount.description: Number of updateable devices currently being updated to the latest available update.

totalNotUpdateableDeviceCount.description: Total number of devices in the namespace that are not eligible for updates.

NamespaceUpdateComplianceReportRequest.description: Request to generate a NamespaceUpdateCompliance report.

Operation.description:
Central status monitor for resource long-running operations on a namespace
(e.g. DeviceCapability create-or-replace / delete). Action LROs (POST
`:verb` endpoints) have their own per-action status-monitor endpoints
and do not surface here.

id.description: The unique ID of the operation.

error.description: Error object that describes the error when status is "Failed".

startTime.description: The time at which the operation was started (UTC).

endTime.description: The time at which the operation reached a terminal state (UTC).

value.description: The DeviceAttribute items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

value.description: The DeviceAuthenticationProfile items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

value.description: The DeviceCapability items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ProvisionDeviceRequest.description: Request body for the provision device endpoint.

iotHubDeviceId.description: The Device ID provided by the customer. Also used by IoT Hub to hold the IoT Hub device ID.

targetEndpoint.description: The service endpoint identifier as returned by the GetNamespace API.

deviceTwin.description: Initial device twin configuration to apply during provisioning.

ProvisionDeviceResult.description: Result of a successful device provisioning operation. Returns nested references to the Device, Capability, and AuthenticationProfile resources written by the orchestration, plus the messaging endpoint the device was provisioned against.

device.description: Reference to the provisioned Device resource.

capability.description: Reference to the provisioned Capability child resource.

authProfile.description: Reference to the provisioned AuthenticationProfile child resource.

endpoint.description: Reference to the messaging endpoint the device was provisioned against.

ProvisionDeviceResultStatusMonitor.description: Status monitor for the long-running `:provision` action on devices in a namespace.

id.description: The unique ID of the operation.

error.description: Error object that describes the error when status is "Failed".

result.description: The result of the operation. Available once `status` is `Succeeded`.

startTime.description: The time at which the operation was started (UTC).

endTime.description: The time at which the operation reached a terminal state (UTC).

ProvisionMode.description: Controls which operations ADR performs during provisioning.

values.name: Full
values.description: Full provisioning: ADR creates the device in IoT Hub and sets twin data.

values.name: RegistryOnly
values.description: Registry-only provisioning: ADR creates registry resources but skips IoT Hub operations. Used when the device already exists in Hub.

ProvisionedAuthProfileRef.description: Reference to a provisioned AuthenticationProfile resource, including the id of the underlying credential.

credentialId.description: GUID identifying the underlying credential. Only set for CertificateAuthority authentication; omitted otherwise.

ProvisionedDeviceRef.description: Reference to a provisioned Device resource.

externalDeviceId.description: The IoT Hub device id (equal to the originating request's iotHubDeviceId).

ProvisionedResourceRef.description: Reference to a provisioned RPaaS resource: its ARM name, system-assigned UUID, and the etag observed at the final write performed during provisioning.

uuid.description: The system-assigned UUID of the resource.

etag.description: The etag observed at the final write performed by the orchestration against this resource.

ProvisioningState.description: The provisioning state of a data-plane resource.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: Resource has been created.

values.name: Failed
values.description: Resource creation failed.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: Resource creation was canceled.

values.name: Accepted
values.description: Resource has been accepted by the server.

values.name: Deleting
values.description: Resource is being deleted.

QueryCountRequest.description: Request body for counting devices in a namespace.

query.description: Optional filter clause applied to the count (e.g. `WHERE properties.deviceClassId = 'dc-1'`). When omitted, all devices in the namespace are counted.

QueryCountResponse.description: Response body for a device count: a single aggregate scalar.

count.description: The number of devices in the namespace that match the supplied filter.

QueryDevicesRequest.description: Request body for querying devices in a namespace.

query.description: The query expression to evaluate against devices in the namespace.

top.description: Maximum number of results to return in this page.

continuationToken.description: Opaque continuation token returned by a previous query response.

QueryDevicesResponse.description: Response body for a device query: a page of projected results.

value.description: The page of query results. Each element is a projected JSON document whose shape is determined by the query.

continuationToken.description: Continuation token for retrieving the next page of results. Present only when more results exist.

QueryDistinctValuesRequest.description: Request body for enumerating the distinct values of a single device field within a namespace.

field.description: The device field to project distinct values of (e.g. `properties.deviceClassId`).

query.description: Optional filter clause applied before the distinct projection (e.g. `WHERE groupMemberships.Contains('g-1')`). When omitted, distinct values across all devices in the namespace are returned.

top.description: Maximum number of distinct values to return in this page.

continuationToken.description: Opaque continuation token returned by a previous distinct response.

QueryDistinctValuesResponse.description: Response body for a distinct device-field query: a page of scalar values.

value.description: The page of distinct scalar values for the requested field.

continuationToken.description: Continuation token for retrieving the next page of distinct values. Present only when more results exist.

reportTarget.description: The scope the report was generated against.

ReportSelector.description:
Selector identifying a report by type and target. Shared as the request
body for both the `:generateReport` and `:getLatestReport` actions.

reportTarget.description: The target of this report (e.g. group resource).

values.name: NamespaceUpdateComplianceReport
values.description: Compliance report describing the updating state of devices in the namespace.

values.name: GroupBestUpdatesComplianceReport
values.description: Report describing the best available updates and update compliance for the devices within a group.

values.name: GroupInstallableUpdatesReport
values.description: Report listing the installable updates for the devices within a group.

ReprovisionDeviceRequest.description: Request body for the reprovision device endpoint.

targetEndpoint.description: The target IoT Hub endpoint (the new hub) to move the device to.

authentication.description: Optional authentication configuration. If omitted, the device's existing AuthenticationProfile is preserved. If supplied, a new AuthenticationProfile is created and the old one is deleted after success.

deviceTwin.description: Optional device twin configuration controlling how the new hub's twin is populated. If omitted, the new hub starts with an empty twin.

deviceUuid.description: Optional device UUID guard. If supplied and does not match the device's stored UUID, the request is rejected.

ReprovisionDeviceResultStatusMonitor.description: Status monitor for the long-running `:reprovision` action on a device in a namespace.

id.description: The unique ID of the operation.

error.description: Error object that describes the error when status is "Failed".

result.description: The result of the operation. Available once `status` is `Succeeded`.

startTime.description: The time at which the operation was started (UTC).

endTime.description: The time at which the operation reached a terminal state (UTC).

ReprovisionDeviceTwin.description: Device twin configuration for reprovisioning with an explicit mode.

mode.description: How to populate the device twin on the new IoT Hub.

RevokeCertsResult.description:
Status monitor for the long-running `:revokeCerts` action on a device authentication
profile. The operation has no payload to return on success; `status` carries the
outcome and `error` carries failure details.

id.description: The unique ID of the operation.

error.description: Error object that describes the error when status is "Failed".

startTime.description: The time at which the operation was started (UTC).

endTime.description: The time at which the operation reached a terminal state (UTC).

SelfSignedThumbprints.description: Self-signed X.509 certificate thumbprints for device authentication.

SelfSignedThumbprintsCreateOrUpdate.description: Self-signed X.509 certificate thumbprints for device authentication.

selfSignedThumbprints.description: Self-signed X.509 thumbprints. Required when type is SelfSignedX509Certificate.
Self-signed X.509 thumbprints. Required when type is SelfSignedX509Certificate.

symmetricKey.description: Symmetric key details. Required when type is SymmetricKey.
Symmetric key details. Required when type is SymmetricKey.

TargetDevices.description: Criteria selecting which devices an update targets.

compatProperties.description: Free-form compatibility properties (e.g. manufacturer, model) used to match devices.

agentProfile.description: The agent profile that the targeted devices must implement.

desired.description: The desired properties to set on the device twin.

UpdateDeviceAttribute.description: A device attribute reported by Azure Device Update.

properties.description: Properties reported by Azure Device Update.

UpdateDeviceAttributeCreateOrUpdate.description: A device attribute reported by Azure Device Update.

properties.description: Properties reported by Azure Device Update.

UpdateDeviceAttributeProperties.description: Properties of the update device attribute, reported by the Azure Device Update agent.

schema.description:
URL of the JSON Schema document describing the concrete shape of this property bag. Optional
advertisement so clients can validate the bag without out-of-band documentation. The service
does not validate or dereference this field — any string is accepted. Suggested value:
`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/<commit-sha>/specification/deviceregistry/schemas/UpdateDeviceAttributeProperties.json`

deviceClassId.description: The device class identifier, calculated by ADU from `agentInfo.compatibilityProperties` and `agentInfo.agentProfile`.

installedUpdateId.description: The identifier of the update currently installed on the device.

agentInfoEtag.description: The entity tag for the reported `agentInfo`.

agentInfo.description: Information reported by the device update agent.

latestUpdateJobInfo.description: Information about the most recent update job targeting this device.

UpdateDeviceAttributePropertiesCreateOrU.description: Properties of the update device attribute, reported by the Azure Device Update agent.

schema.description:
URL of the JSON Schema document describing the concrete shape of this property bag. Optional
advertisement so clients can validate the bag without out-of-band documentation. The service
does not validate or dereference this field — any string is accepted. Suggested value:
`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/<commit-sha>/specification/deviceregistry/schemas/UpdateDeviceAttributeProperties.json`

deviceClassId.description: The device class identifier, calculated by ADU from `agentInfo.compatibilityProperties` and `agentInfo.agentProfile`.

installedUpdateId.description: The identifier of the update currently installed on the device.

agentInfoEtag.description: The entity tag for the reported `agentInfo`.

agentInfo.description: Information reported by the device update agent.

latestUpdateJobInfo.description: Information about the most recent update job targeting this device.

UpdateDeviceCapabilityProperties.description: The device capabilities properties for an update capability.

UpdateDeviceCapabilityPropertiesCreateOr.description: The device capabilities properties for an update capability.

UpdateId.description: Identifies a specific update by provider, name, and version.

provider.description: The provider that published the update.

UpdateJobInfo.description: Information about an update job targeting a device.

workflowId.description: The identifier of the update job workflow.

state.description: The current state of the update job.

updateId.description: The identifier of the update being applied by the job.

installResult.description: The result of installing the update on the device, if available.

UpdateJobInfoCreateOrUpdate.description: Information about an update job targeting a device.

workflowId.description: The identifier of the update job workflow.

state.description: The current state of the update job.

updateId.description: The identifier of the update being applied by the job.

installResult.description: The result of installing the update on the device, if available.

UpdateJobState.description: The state of an update job on a device.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: The update job completed successfully.

values.name: Failed
values.description: The update job failed.

values.name: InProgress
values.description: The update job is in progress.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: The update job was canceled.

UpdateStepResult.description: The terminal result of an individual installation step.

updateId.description: The identifier of the leaf update worked on by this step. ADU resolves this from the manifest's `instructions.steps` (inline step → parent updateId; reference step → child updateId).

outcome.description: Authoritative terminal outcome of this step.

failureOrigin.description: Best-effort hint identifying which subsystem produced the failure for this step. Value is `NOT_APPLICABLE` for successful install.

resultCode.description: Step-level install result code. Same semantics as `InstallResult.resultCode`.

extendedResultCodes.description: Step-level extended result codes. Same format as `InstallResult.extendedResultCodes`.

resultDetails.description: Human-readable result details for this step.

UserDeviceAttribute.description:
A device attribute reported by a customer or other non-Microsoft caller. The `properties` bag
is opaque — the service stores customer-defined fields verbatim and returns them on read.
The service does not interpret, validate, or constrain the bag's contents.

UserDeviceAttributeCreateOrUpdate.description:
A device attribute reported by a customer or other non-Microsoft caller. The `properties` bag
is opaque — the service stores customer-defined fields verbatim and returns them on read.
The service does not interpret, validate, or constrain the bag's contents.

UserDeviceAttributeProperties.description:
Customer-defined opaque property bag for a `User`-reported device attribute. Any field shape
is accepted; the service stores and returns the bag verbatim without inspection. Customers
who want to advertise a schema for their bag may include their own field (e.g. `$schema`).

X509HubUploadedCertificateAuthorityAuthe.description: Authentication for devices whose client certificate is rooted to a CA uploaded to IoT Hub. No additional credential fields are required.
Authentication for devices whose client certificate is rooted to a CA uploaded to IoT Hub. No additional credential fields are required.

LongRunningOperationIdHeader.description:
Optional client-supplied identifier for the operation's status monitor.
If omitted, the service generates a GUID.

ProvisionDeviceRequest.mode.name: mode
ProvisionDeviceRequest.mode.description: Controls which operations ADR performs. Defaults to full when omitted.

values.name: Full
values.description: Full provisioning: ADR creates the device in IoT Hub and sets twin data.

values.name: RegistryOnly
values.description: Registry-only provisioning: ADR creates registry resources but skips IoT Hub operations. Used when the device already exists in Hub.

ReprovisionDeviceRequest.ifMatch.name: If-Match
ReprovisionDeviceRequest.ifMatch.description: The ETag of the device resource. Used to prevent concurrent modifications.
